name: /pr-corpus-update accepts an operator override budget for a single source via --budget-override
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --budget-override 200000 --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'effective_budget=200000' out.txt && grep -q 'override=operator' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
